entities.name: WorkoutTracker
entities.context: Python-based workout tracking system with SQLite backend and matplotlib graphing

entities.name: workouts.db
entities.context: SQLite database at Personal/Health/workouts.db storing workout and resting HR data

entities.name: matplotlib
entities.context: Python plotting library used in headless/Agg mode for generating workout graphs

entities.name: sqlite3
entities.context: Database engine used to persist workout logs and daily resting heart rate

entities.name: Weekly Fitness Goals
entities.context: Default targets of 90 minutes per week across 2 workout days

entities.name: Resting Heart Rate Tracking
entities.context: Daily resting HR logged in daily_resting_hr table, used as a health metric

entities.name: Primary Modality
entities.context: Workout classification field in the workouts table indicating exercise type

entities.name: Personal/Health
entities.context: Canonical workspace directory housing V's health tracking infrastructure

relationships.context: Reads workout and resting HR data from SQLite database for analysis and graphing
Generates graphs in headless Agg mode, saved to WorkoutTracker/graphs/
Measures actual workout volume against 90-min/2-day weekly targets
Daily resting HR stored in daily_resting_hr table alongside workout logs
Loads and visualizes resting HR trends as a health indicator
Queries primary_modality field to categorize and analyze workout types
